title: Misfits-Cascades: an agent-based model of performance-conditioned digital adoption among firms
description: Replication package for the agent-based model in "When a Few Misfits Trigger Digital Adoption Cascades: Network Reach, Threshold Heterogeneity, and Performance-Conditioned Complex Contagion in an Agent-Based Model of Firms." Implemented in Julia using Agents.jl and Graphs.jl.
